title: bdallophytum caesareum
intro: Bdallophytum caesareum, also known as Tian Hua Fen, is a type of flowering plant in the Asclepiadaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, making it useful in treating fever and rheumatic diseases. The health benefits of Bdallophytum caesareum include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into a powder or decoction, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
